temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man with a somber expression peers through a barred window. The lighting is dim and moody, casting a greenish hue on the scene. He looks directly towards the camera with a serious, almost challenging gaze before turning his head slightly. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a tense and mysterious atmosphere, introducing a character who appears to be confined or watching something intently.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A tense, rhythmic, and percussive score begins, creating a sense of suspense.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a dark, narrow kitchen. A person's silhouette is visible on the right side, moving around. On a high shelf, two white bowls are neatly arranged. The lighting is extremely low, making details difficult to discern. (Storyline: This shot transitions the setting to a kitchen, suggesting a domestic or preparatory activity is about to take place. The low light maintains the suspenseful mood.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense, percussive music continues, linking the two scenes.)
